title: STRhub Verified tool manifest
description: Author-declared contract for a reproducible-execution attestation. The harness runs ONLY what this file declares. It makes no claim about accuracy, casework fitness, or regulatory validation.

contact.description: Issue tracker or email for failure reports

ref.description: Pinned commit SHA or release tag. MUST be immutable.

dockerfile.description: Path to the Dockerfile, relative to this manifest

os.description: OS targets the attestation is scoped to, e.g. ['ubuntu-22.04']. Honesty matters: only claim what you test.

cmd.description: Command executed INSIDE the container. /data/in is the read-only fixture mount, /data/out is the writable output mount.

fixture.description: Path to the test fixture dir, relative to repo root

outputs.description: Expected output artifacts. The IO gate checks each one.

min_records.description: Minimum non-header data rows/records required (guards against silent empty output).

content.description: OPTIONAL content gate (rung above IO): structural + locus plausibility checks on the rows. Proves the output looks like genotype-bearing data; still no claim of biological correctness.

columns.description: Exact number of tab-separated fields every data row must have.

dna_column.description: 0-based index of a column that must contain only A/C/G/T/N.

count_columns.description: 0-based indices of columns that must be non-negative integers (read counts).

locus_sep.description: Separator between locus and allele in the locus column.

min_distinct_loci.description: Minimum number of distinct loci that must appear.

expect_loci.description: Loci that MUST be present (e.g. core CODIS loci).

min_total_reads.description: Minimum sum of read counts across all calls (guards against all-noise output).

report.description: Optional reporting overrides. Use 'slug' to give a tool variant its own attestation/badge filenames (reports/<slug>.json and <slug>.badge.json).

slug.description: Filename stem for this variant's report + badge, e.g. 'strait-razor-PowerSeqv2.31'.

reproduces_own_example.description: OPTIONAL gate 5. Compares output to the tool's OWN published example result for the fixture. Verifies documented behaviour, NOT biological correctness.

expected.description: Path to the golden file shipped by the author, relative to manifest

produced.description: Glob of the produced file to compare, relative to /data/out
